name: p2p
desc: Multi-tracker WebRTC signalling. Fans out to every tracker in TRACKERS[] in parallel; peers find each other via the union of connected trackers, not one chosen tracker. Per-URL reconnect with exponential back-off.

→.name: mkOffers
→.flow: ∀ i<n → RTCPC ⊕ wire(🔌,uuid) ⊕ createOffer ⊕ waitIce ⊕ schedule PENDING_TTL_MS reap

→.name: onOffer
→.flow: RTCPC ⊕ setRemote(offer) ⊕ createAnswer ⊕ waitIce ⊕ sock.send (reply on same tracker)

→.name: onAnswer
→.flow: pending.delete(offer_id) ⊕ setRemote(answer) — first tracker to deliver wins

→.name: connectTracker
→.flow: if already open/connecting bail ⊕ new WebSocket ⊕ 6s timeout ⊕ onopen: announce(this sock) ⊕ onclose: scheduleReconnect

→.name: join
→.flow: close all 🔌 ⊕ clear(pm, pending, timers) ⊕ ∀ TRACKERS → connectTracker(url) in parallel
